programme.desc: Detectives find a loaded gun while searching a vehicle. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E26 Pitted Against Each Other
programme.desc: A chase ends after one of the police units disables the vehicle. An officer responds to a domestic dispute between a mother and her son. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with expired tags.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E33 Motojam
programme.desc: A K-9 unit finds the suspect hiding in a shed. A cooperative suspect is faced with a list of charges. A motorcycle chase comes to an end after the suspect ditches the stolen bike and flees on foot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E08 Mud Slingers
programme.desc: Police use convenience store footage to make an arrest for burglary. Police attempt to help two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E26 Bail Fail
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot. An arrest is made after a couple leaving a known drug house is pulled over and questioned.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E03 Shovel Trouble
programme.desc: Officers conduct a sting using a decoy vehicle. A man with a knife flees the scene of a dispute with his baby mama. Deputies are dispatched when a man is assaulted with a shovel over twenty dollars.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E29 Strange Pairing
programme.desc: Three men are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at an apartment complex. An officer discovers a teenager is dating an older man.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E22 Dealt A Bad Hand
programme.desc: Multiple suspects spill out in a mad scramble when their vehicle flips over in a pursuit. A distraught man complains that a stranger tried to lasso him with a metal necklace. A driver has trouble staying in his lane after a lousy night of poker.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E31 Window of Opportunity
programme.desc: Officers come to the rescue when a troubled man hits a low point. The cops are called when a man starts a food fight. Deputies catch a man off-guard during their search of a parking garage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E32 Over the Wall
programme.desc: A white-knuckled police chase ends in a dramatic escape and an unsettling officer injury. A woman spots an intoxicated prowler in a tree. Officers bring in the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspicious van.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E21 On Thin Ice
programme.desc: A defiant suspect winds up on the wrong side of a K-9 bite. A former fiancé becomes a neighborhood nuisance when he pays his ex an unwanted visit. A routine traffic stop turns into warrants, pregnancy, and Meth.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E27 Messy Situation
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting in a neighborhood. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E17 Dark Tale
programme.desc: Officers assist an off-duty deputy being followed by a vehicle trying to force him off of the road. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call involving a woman and her cheating husband.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E26 Pub Rules
programme.desc: A prostitution sting leads police to uncover additional crimes. A prostitute tells deputies she wanted money to buy her daughter a birthday gift. Deputies are called to an assault at a pub.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E15 Fighting to Lose
programme.desc: An after hours search of a park turns up a young couple in a porta potty. An extremely combative man refuses to surrender. A heated argument between best friends catches the attention of the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E07 Allergy Season
programme.desc: A drunk driver rams into a pursuing police car. A man on a bike flees an area known for drug activity on a bike. A sniffling man attempts to hide a baggie with narcotics under his shirt.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E06 Two Too Many
programme.desc: A man fights with his wife over a haircut then leads police on a car chase. A woman gets violent with her boyfriend and then calls the police on him. An intoxicated woman tells deputies she only had two drinks.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E29 Hanky Panky
programme.desc: A driver bails out of his vehicle after an attempted traffic stop, the suspect is ultimately tased and arrested. An officer assists with a fight call on the Las Vegas Strip. A Florida man is arrested after an unlikely story is deemed inaccurate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E30 Rock Star
programme.desc: An irate man has trouble accepting the truth. Officers question a cagey group in an effort to confirm their suspicions. An argument between Mom and Dad becomes violent, so the kids call the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E14 If the Shoe Fits
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E03 Kicking and Screaming
programme.desc: Family members are forced to take sides when a belligerent man lashes out. Deputies become suspicious when they spot people in the backseat of a parked car. A repeat offender is caught red-handed.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E09 Tree Hugging
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver is stopped with suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E16 Out of Sight, Out of Mind
programme.desc: A lawbreaker tries to blame his actions on familial duty. A father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son. Officers discover some interesting items when they search a family man’s car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E13 Highway to Jail
programme.desc: ATV joyriders lead officers on an unwieldy chase. An attempt to check on some expired tags ends with a couple at gunpoint. A motorist gives deputies his brother’s name in hopes of avoiding jail time.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E28 To the Lighthouse
programme.desc: Officers are called to a restaurant after the owner is held at gunpoint. Police respond to a woman being sexually harassed in a park. A drunk man tells police he is going to buy a lighthouse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E04 No Respect these Days
programme.desc: A combative man at a fast food restaurant claims his phone was stolen. Multiple illegal items are found on a man parked on the side of the road. An intoxicated man throws an 83-year-old’s walker.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E03 Settling Debts
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E10 Pickup Pullover
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A bicyclist is charged with possession and public intoxication. A man is pulled over for expired tags.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E12 ID Please
programme.desc: Officers pursue a man who attempted to cash a bad check then fled the scene. Police are called when a man’s ex-girlfriend breaks into his house. Police chase an unlicensed teen speeding in a vehicle

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E05 Grown Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: An irate Wal-Mart shopper won't listen and goes home with the taser special. An incoherent ex-marine struggles to explain why he decked a man. A routine traffic stop yields a truckload of dogs and an undressing maniac.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E19 Nightvision
programme.desc: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman. A man doesn’t deal with being laughed at by his neighbor in a peaceful way.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E07 Finding Fido
programme.desc: A drunk man threatens both firefighters and the police. Police are called over a dispute regarding an alleged missing dog. A drunk driver changes his story when his friend is found pinned under his car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E08 Pinky Promise
programme.desc: A sleeping motorist greets deputies with a foul mood. The cops respond to reports of a suspicious person, only to uncover much more. A young woman tries to promise her way out of a trip to jail.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E09 Dead End Dash
programme.desc: One suspect takes his chances in a ravine after he leads deputies to a dead end. A vehicle search turns a family outing into a trip to jail. The cops inspect a disturbance between a dad and his son.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E16 We Run the Show
programme.desc: A stealthy robbery suspect leads officers on a chase through backyards. After dropping a bag of meth, a man swears he’s only seen the drug on TV. A doped-up domestic violence suspect tries to claim self-defense.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E25 Dope Delivery
programme.desc: Officers intercept a drunk female driver using a PIT maneuver. A routine traffic stop results in an arrest after officers discover a concealed weapon as well as drugs. An officer makes an arrest after pulling over a vehicle transporting a sizable bag of marijuana.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E23 Nudged Out
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E07 No Shirt, Lots of Service
programme.desc: When approached by police, a suspect decides to take his shirt off and taunt the officers. Twin sisters ask for help when their third sister is threated by her boyfriend. An intoxicated suspect crashes his wife’s car into a light pole.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E32 Follow Me to the River
programme.desc: A deputy jumps into a waterway to arrest a fleeing suspect. Officers respond to roommates in an argument. Officers are called after a group of women are attacked.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E08 You've Gotta Believe Me
programme.desc: A DWI suspect flees from police because he thinks they won’t believe his version of events. A suspect is stopped for jaywalking but when questioned she can’t keep still. A naive man leaves his car unattended for a moment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E15 Mamma's House
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man who ran from a traffic stop. A man being pursued tells officers he was going to his mother’s house. A drunk driver won’t admit to hitting a car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E30 Connect Four
programme.desc: Deputies assist border patrol in pursuit of a vehicle that has blown checkpoint and its tires. A drunk woman is pulled over not knowing she is missing a tire.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E16 Can't Run from Motorola
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E17 Two Mr. Fix Its
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to flee when officers tell him they will search him. Two men get in a fight over window installation. A hotel room is filled like a clown car with multiple suspects.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E19 AJAX
programme.desc: Police arrest a bicycling dealer and his client. Police respond to a call of an unhinged rottweiler. Officers arrest an inebriated man after they spot him grabbing a female bystander.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E07 Boat Guy
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcyclist. A man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother after a boating trip. Police seize a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo from a man.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E27 Truck Trunks
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E24 Copy of Breaking Home Barriers
programme.desc: Officers respond after two men kick in a woman's door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. An officer arrests a husband for domestic abuse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E26 School Zone Chase
programme.desc: Officers find drugs after pursuing a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car. Officers intervene in a domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E21 Hands Off The Junk
programme.desc: A passenger bails from a fleeing stolen vehicle then claims that he was only getting a ride. An undercover officer pulls a sting on a handsy prostitute. An anxious lady gets nabbed for weed after calling the police on her quarrelsome husband.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E06 Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer investigates a local bar known for illegal activity.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E17 Facebook Fury
programme.desc: A DUI suspect reminds an officer of one famous dude. A naked man shocks a stranger on her porch. A daughter’s tantrum shakes the whole apartment when mom takes away Facebook.

programme.title: Construction Squad
programme.desc: Zespół budowlany buduje Samochodzikowo cegła po cegle! Pokazują, że wszystko jest możliwe z pomocą naszych przyjaciół.

programme.title: The 1980 POWER Hour!

programme.title: Stingray Remember the '80s
programme.desc: Relive the decade of perms and shoulder pads! The unmistakable synth pop sound of artists such as Michael Jackson, George Michael, and Whitney Houston, is bound to remind you of all your greatest '80s memories!

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Recorded live in Hamburg, this 2007 concert features a high-voltage mix of new material and legendary classics. Experience the enduring power of a hard rock institution with over 30 years of history on the stage.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: The Art Of Destruction
programme.desc: Founded in 1982, DESTRUCTION is a "Big Three" titan of German thrash alongside Kreator and Sodom. With uncompromising music and high-energy shows, they’ve thrilled millions. Discover the story of a global force that helped define the genre.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: An essential piece of rock history. Since 1969, Wishbone Ash has taken their legendary twin-guitar sound across the globe. Witness this milestone 30th-anniversary performance captured live in London.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Found your new baseline. Rock Bottom digs deep into the rawest hard rock and alt-anthems. We’re hitting the floor with heavy riffs and soulful grit—no shovels required, just volume. This is the foundation of everything that kicks.

programme.title: Manic Ritual
programme.desc: Lose yourself in the flickering shadows of distortion. A hypnotic sequence of sonic violence and dark imagery designed to unsettle the soul. Bow to the heavy. Welcome to the Manic Ritual.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Discover how the Flying V revolutionized Rock and Metal. Featuring icons from Metallica, Megadeth, Slayer, and Judas Priest, this documentary explores the history and secrets behind the world’s most unique guitar and the legends who play it.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Quick Eats
programme.desc: Host Desiree Nielsen spiralizes zucchini into zoodles to create a balanced, veggie-packed pad thai dish.

programme.title: Dine Your Sign
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Dine Your Sign - Spring Special
programme.desc: On the Dine Your Sign Spring Special, Chef Siobhan Detkavich is cooking for Aries, Taurus, and Gemini! First, quiche with the season’s most delicious gifts – tender asparagus and earthy morels – suspended in silky custard and smothered in creamy fontina cheese! Next, spring lamb is stuffed with a sprightly pesto of mint and dandelion greens and roasted with shallots and new potatoes. Then, it’s an easy, healthy halibut dish with ramps (aka ‘wild garlic’) and grassy fiddleheads – the fish is steamed and finished with a sizzling pour over oil treatment that leaves the kitchen smelling like heaven! Finally, dessert a spring sign is sure to love: buttery, flaky croissant, stuffed with rich...

programme.title: Dine Your Sign
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Taurus
programme.desc: Chef Siobhan is all in for Taurus! She starts with a hearty, meaty, braised lamb shank and earthy aromatics for an earth sign. Plus some Yorkshire Puddings cooked in lamb fat, too! The next dish is salad Taurus style! A wedge salad with hard-cooked eggs and homemade ranch dressing! Next, a medley of green peas with seared scallops. Finally, a single-serve, no-sharing dessert for Taurus: a whole Granny Smith apple dumpling, stuffed with cheddar cheese, wrapped in pastry, and baked golden brown!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Love Japan
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Love Japan by Aaron Israel and Sawako Okochi with Gabriella Gershensen! Follow along as Shahir makes mouth-watering dishes like a chicken katsu sando, blistered shishito peppers, slice-and-bake matcha cookies, and so much more!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Movie Night
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a movie night meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: loaded turkey nachos, pizza flavored popcorn, spiced cucumber sticks, and chocolate covered pretzel sticks!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Pool Party
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a pool party meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: grilled steak with chimichurri, spinach salad with pickled radish, and fruit salad with coconut and basil!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 East Coast Vibes
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an East Coast-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: clam chowder, shrimp rolls, a simple salad, and blueberry cobbler!

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Meet Tara Broadbent
programme.desc: Adopted Tara Broadbent is shocked by the results of her DNA test and learns more about her biological ancestry through food.

programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Bananas
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular recipes featuring bananas!

programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Korean
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular snack recipes, from hosts like Kyle Crawford and Vanessa Gianfrancesco.

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Everything’s Better with Butter
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing dishes featuring butter! Josh makes fish and a butter washed cocktail while Erica prepares Parisian gnocchi!

programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 One Ingredient Three Ways
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing dish featuring one ingredient three ways! Josh works with parsnips while Erica preps potatoes!

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Teddy Bear Picnic
programme.desc: Teddy Bears of all age, shape, and size join our grill team with their owners for a day of games, rides and some teddy bear repair. Matt & the RG team are BBQing a menu even the pickiest eater will love. The menu: Grilled Almond Butter & Banana Sandwiches, Grilled Meatball Sub, Smoked White Cheddar Macaroni, and Quick & Snappy Ginger Lemon Ice Cream Sandwiches.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Energy Boost
programme.desc: Food nerd Desiree Nielsen masters a perfectly cooked eggplant topped with a flavourful charmoula and couscous.

programme.desc: Desiree Nielsen shows how beets can make the icing on a delectable cupcake vibrant and delicious.

programme.desc: Foodie Desiree Nielsen gives life to spotty bananas, transforming it into melt-in-your-mouth bread.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Veggies All Day Long

programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Barbeque isn’t Just for Meat

programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Rice Bowl
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zach cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Rice Bowl! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Taco 'Bout Delicious
programme.desc: Tacos take a turn on the griddle, blending time-honored tradition with new inspiration. Crisped tortillas, inventive fillings, and vibrant toppings come together in a celebration of the world’s most versatile handheld meal.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Searing Steak Perfection
programme.desc: Steak gets the griddle treatment in a celebration of texture and taste. From smoky crusts to tender centers, explore how temperature control and creative seasoning redefine what perfection means on a sizzling surface.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 $25 Feasts: Budget Meals
programme.desc: A modest budget inspires bold ideas as just twenty five dollars stretches into satisfying, flavor-packed griddle meals. Simple ingredients are transformed with imagination and skill, proving that good food doesn’t have to come with a high price tag.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Meet Kelly Harvey-Mycula
programme.desc: Kelly Harvey-Mycula is shocked by the results of her DNA test and learns more about her ancestry with the help of host Tyrone Edwards.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E23 Grilled Thai dishes
programme.desc: It's all about the grill as Thai chef and cookbook author Pailin Changchitnant makes dish after dish to go on the BBQ, like grilled eggplant salad, steak with dipping sauce or in a salad, and fish in banana leaves.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 Balancing Sweet with Savoury
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Izakaya Finger Foods
programme.desc: Every culture has its version of finger food and in Japan it’s called Izakaya! Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen prepares tapas dishes perfect for nighttime snacking.

programme.title: Cook Like A Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E15 Soup Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Join Chef Craig Wong as he teaches us his tricks for building beautiful bowls full of broth and flavour in his celebration of soup.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Popular Japanese Noodles
programme.desc: Noodles are the star ingredients when chef Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen cooks up somen noodles with dipping sauce, ramen salad, a fried noodle dish, and a one-pot delight.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E07 Salad Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Salad is a wonderful addition to any meal, and sometimes even a meal on its own"... today, the talented Chef Craig Wong shares several of his superior salad ideas.

programme.title: Blitz!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 More Shahir Massoud
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next to Shahir Massoud as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Taco 'Bout Delicious
programme.desc: Tacos take a turn on the griddle, blending time-honored tradition with new inspiration. Crisped tortillas, inventive fillings, and vibrant toppings come together in a celebration of the world’s most versatile handheld meal.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 That's Amore
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts cooks up an Italian feast for four including a cheesy Cannelloni and a fast and fluffy Tiramisu.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Night at the Pub
programme.desc: It's pub night in Spencer Watts' kitchen! Forget going out - Spencer's pub recipes are bold in flavour and mild on the wallet!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 French Canadian
programme.desc: In under 30 minutes, chef Spencer Watts cooks up four hearty, rich, and mouth-watering French-Canadian dishes.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Soap Box Derby
programme.desc: Not only do the racers in the Soap Box Derby have a need for speed, they have a need for BBQ! Matt and the RG team cook up a feast to slow down any speedster. The menu: Smoked Shrimp B.L.T., Pineapple Basil Rotisserie Chicken, Grilled Sweet Potato Pops, and Summer Berry Pudding.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Day By the Water
programme.desc: Matt spends the day by the water; fishing, playing Frisbee, catching some rays. What goes with water and sun? BBQ!!! Matt & his team make a seafood buffet of Grilled Clams in the Shell with Serrano Ham, Smoked Lake Rainbow Trout, Grilled Lobster with Grapefruit Salsa, and Crab-Stuffed Avocados.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 France + Vietnam
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates is television's best travel show that never leaves the kitchen. Skilled Chef Craig Wong is your host, and prepare to be blown away by his takes on the foods of France and Vietnam. First up? A re-write of a popular Vietnamese street snack made with Clams and Sesame Rice Noodles. Next? Marrow Toast dresses up in its tux and tails for a version made with King Oyster Mushrooms and Sauce Bordelaise. The common ingredient is Baguette; check out supersonic versions of French Jambon Beurre and Vietnamese Banh Mi. The Big Dish blends delicate sole with ProvencÌ§ale flavour spiked Nuoc Cham and a crunchy Haricot Amandine inspired Vietnamese crepe.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Dim Yum!
programme.desc: Warm and talented Cantonese home cook Mary Tang kick starts this One World Kitchen 3 episode by show- casing traditional, evERS-popular dim-sum dishes. First up, juicy Pork-Filled Dumplings! Made with fresh watERS-chest- nuts, shiitake mushrooms and a blend of Asian sauces and spices, these sweet and salty bite-sized creations are to die for! To add to our desire, Mary fries up some savoury Chinese Daikon Radish Cakes in a piping hot wok. Next, a flavourful lotus leaf filled with sticky rice and a medley of salted duck eggs, Shaoxing wine, and dried shrimp is truly hard to resist! To finish off, Mary combines gorgeous Adzuki beans with rice flour and sesame seeds to create airy and full...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Ireland + Japan
programme.desc: If you are talking about Irish food, it's hard not to talk about Corned Beef and Cabbage. On this episode of CombiNATION Plates, Chef Craig Wong delivers his unusual take using Beef Cheek, modern technique, and a caraway-infused Carrot Terrine for fun! Next up is a tribute to Izakaya eats, featuring Tare Grilled Duck Hearts, Miso-roasted Mushroom, and Agedashi Tofu. The featured common ingredient is Oysters. For Ireland, it's Garlic GratineÌe; for Japan, check out the Kaki Yaki, oysters broiled with miso and rich Japanese Kewpie mayo. For the final dish, light up! Smoking is permitted! Check out blowtorch-seared and tableside-smoked Wagyu Beef, brushed with Irish Stout Teriyaki and...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 No Cutlery Required
programme.desc: Say goodbye to dirty cutlery in this One World Kitchen 3 episode featuring Vietnamese finger foods! Talented cook Lisa Nguyen starts off by making delicious Pork Skewer Rolls - perfect for any party! Featuring tender pork, crispy lettuce, fresh mint, crunchy cucumber, and Chinese chives wrapped in soft rice paper, this dish pairs well with a nuoc cham dipping sauce. Sticky Lemongrass Spare Ribs are next up to the plate; steamed and marinated in a garlicy, caramel glaze (yum!). Next, Lisa fries up some tasty Shrimp and Sweet Potato Fritters using a foolproof technique, adding nuoc cham dipping sauce and lovely Bibb lettuce on the side. Finally, fingERS-licking Vietnamese Coffee Cupcakes...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Thai Street Food
programme.desc: Thai chef Pailin Chongchitnant shows us the secrets behind Bangkok's famous street food with pork skewers, noodle soup, five-spice pork belly soup, and pandan coconut custard fondue.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 Thai Sauces
programme.desc: It's all about the sauces as Pailin Chongchitnant shows us how easy and versatile they are in Thai cuisine.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Delicious Grilled Shellfish
programme.desc: Shellfish is delicate, tantalizing, and full of flavour, especially when it's grilled to perfection

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Movie Night
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a movie night meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: loaded turkey nachos, pizza flavored popcorn, spiced cucumber sticks, and chocolate covered pretzel sticks!

programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a pool party meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: grilled steak with chimichurri, spinach salad with pickled radish, and fruit salad with coconut and basil!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Sunshine and Showers
programme.desc: An ode to Sunshine and Showers, this delectable Flour Power spring themed special inspires with three deliciously creative desserts. programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Coffee Klatch

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Tandoori Take-Out
programme.desc: It's Tandoori Take-Out night as host Spencer Watts prepares five quick and easy Indian dishes that take little time, but are big in flavour.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Air Show
programme.desc: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a day of great BBQ. Inspired by the aerial acrobatics of CF18's and Harvards, Matt cooks up a variety of poultry and fowl. The menu: Bacon Wrapped Quail Stuffed with 3 Cream Cheeses, Raspberry Chipotle Turkey Wings, Grilled Balsamic Marinated Duck Breast, and Deviled Eggs.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Golf Tournament
programme.desc: Whether you're a pro or a beginner, everyone is welcome to join the Road Grill team at the 19th tee where Matt is busy burnin' up his Q's. What better way to end your day at the links with an enticing menu of Miso Citrus Grilled Sablefish, Smoked Rack of Pork with a Sour Cherry Sauce , Lemon Basil Smashed Potatoes with Mushrooms, Arugula Salad with Peaches, and Blue Cheese and Walnuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Sailors Bon Voyage
programme.desc: In between hoisting sails and scrubbing the deck, Matt and his team prepare a feast for the sailors before going on a long voyage. Not only is the weather perfect for sailing, it's perfect for BBQing! The menu: Scallop Corn Bacon Burger, Maple-apple Brined Pork Chops, Grilled Tuna Bruschetta, and Strawberry Marscapone Trifle.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Teddy Bear Picnic
programme.desc: Teddy Bears of all age, shape, and size join our grill team with their owners for a day of games, rides and some teddy bear repair. Matt & the RG team are BBQing a menu even the pickiest eater will love. The menu: Grilled Almond Butter & Banana Sandwiches, Grilled Meatball Sub, Smoked White Cheddar Macaroni, and Quick & Snappy Ginger Lemon Ice Cream Sandwiches.

programme.desc: Desiree Nielsen shows how beets can make the icing on a delectable cupcake vibrant and delicious.

programme.desc: Equipar al pueblo para el ministerio de dios para llevar a cabo la visión de Dios de "enseñar a todas las naciones" a conocer a Jesús.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: After 10 successful years living in Boston, Elaine Mitchell made the decision to come back to the old sod with her earnings.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: No close neighbours, beautiful views of the Wicklow Mountains, a large vegetable patch, 10 hens, four ducks, two geese, four beehives, two dogs and three cats.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marcus and Margaret are about to extend a two-bed cottage in Dundrum and share it with Marcus's beloved Aunt May.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The number one criteria when buying a house is location and our fifth programme of the series is set in one of the most sought after costal parts of the country, Dalkey.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: John Rochford from Dublin and Lee Benn, originally from Limerick, have bought a house in their dream location - South Dublin's seaside suburbia, Blackrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps a family to transform their 70s bungalow outside Tipperary into a modern family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot goes to Cork to work with a family spanning three generations - who all have different ideas on how to improve their home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon tries to turn a dilapidated, woodworm infested 1930s cottage into a starter home for a Finglas family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S06 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot tackles a large Victorian terraced house in the highly sought-after Dublin suburb of Donnybrook.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The first in the season will see Catherine Bennett and her youngest daughter Sarah Jane keen to downsize from their huge 13-bedroomed house in Mullingar. They're planning to move down the road, where they also own a 3-bed bungalow that's been uninhabited for the last nine years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot faces a unique challenge in Clane, Co. Kildare.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps Senator Katherine Zappone and Dr Ann Louise Gilligan renovate a dilapidated hunting lodge in Brittas, Dublin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Desperate for more space, a couple with two young daughters, who have long since outgrown their tiny cottage in Killawalla outside Westport, engage Dermot to help.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: New Yorker Ursula and accountant Jimmy from Ennis enlist Dermot's help with their colossal house in Firhouse, Dublin

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Clare Heenan and Rory Kelly live in a compact 1950's bungalow in the south Dublin suburb of Stillorgan. Long time renters, the couple struggled for years to afford this house. It's their first home but with a series of small, disjointed rooms and a damp, grotty extension - it's far from ideal...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the ten years since they first met Avril and Andrew Wilson-Rankin have been dreaming of owning their own home. Now they've bought a property in Dun Laoghaire south county Dublin but it's as far from being a home, or even a house, as you could imagine.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jean Robinson and Daithi Elliffe have bought themselves what they hope will be an ideal family home in a unique location - a listed 19th century former schoolhouse at Kilternan with spectacular views of the Dublin mountains, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Struggling with a tight schedule, a limited budget and the traditionalist taste of his clients, can Dermot balance their love of classic farmhouse design with his own vision of clean urban functionality?

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Dermot wants to create a wheelchair friendly house in Malahide that's also a welcoming family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Sally-Ann, her husband Trevor, and their four children live in Sally-Ann's childhood home - a huge, distinctive 1970s architect-designed home outside Mullingar in Westmeath that they've dreamed of rennovating for years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Since they married two years ago, Paul and Sabina Horgan have become the proud parents of baby Mia and the owners of a property on the North Dublin coast: Lismara - a dilapidated 1940s cottage in Portmarnock in an extremely poor condition.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: GP, writer and budding musician Dr Pat Harrold, his wife Marita, a physiotherapist, and their four kids returned to Pat's home town of Nenagh 10 years ago and they have been looking for a place to call home ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Leonard and Caroline live in house once owned by Leonard's grandparents in the south Dublin suburb of Dundrum - a 1960s three-bed semi that hasn't changed at all since the couple bought it two years ago.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the village of Puckaun in north Tipperary, teachers Darragh Egan, his partner Sarah Lovett and their three month old son Donagh are moving home. What could be simpler or more straightforward? Well, as it turns out, quite a lot. Home is the 1960s bungalow where Darragh grew up - built on the site of the old village school by his late father Jim and currently occupied by his 70 year old mother.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Airline pilot Ian Callaghan has bought a 1930s Victorian house in his hometown of Drogheda, County Louth, which he and his girlfriend Claire Moore are keen to call home. Though full of charm and period features, the house is in dire need of renovation. Enter: architect Dermot Bannon with an innovative plan to retain the building's century-old ambience while adding a radical modern extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Last year, Aoife from Sutton and her wife Mel from New Zealand bought themselves a three bed semi in Baldoyle north Dublin - a tiny house in a spectacular bayside location. With incredible, unobstructed views of the sea and Portmarnock golf course, they've been hoping to renovate the house to suit its superb location ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Maynooth. Seven years ago, George and Sinead Mullis fell in love in with the Coach house - an 1850s building on half an acre of the historic former Carton Estate in Maynooth. In 2014, they bought the place for just half of its former asking price and moved in with their two year old son Daniel. But what seemed like their dream home soon turned out to be anything but.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A special edition of the show where Dermot revisits three of his favourite builds from earlier series: the Longford publicans he convinced the embrace the void, a couple moving home from California to Bishopstown and 14 year old Michael's wheelchair accessible semi-d in Malahide.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Robbie and Julie from Darndale in North Dublin have saved for over 20 years to buy the house of their dreams - a 1940s cottage in the picturesque north Dublin suburb of Malahide. With a budget of 180K, Dermot's clients plan to gut the cottage, doubling its size with a spacious new two-storey extension to the rear, but the remediation costs are high.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Farmer and Boatbuilder Enda and his wife Mags live on a 55 acre Brussel Sprout farm at Balheary near Swords in North Dublin. After three decades of life in the country, they're moving back to Enda's home town - the picturesque seaside village of Rush. Their new home, formerly owned by Enda's aunt is an old fisherman's house near the harbour.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Moate in County Westmeath, is a place where football is part sport, part religion. On an overgrown plot on the outskirts of town lies the abandoned future home of county GAA All Star Dessie Dolan, his wife Kelly and their 3-year-old son Nathan. They have bought themselves a dilapidated cottage on a hopelessly exposed site in the village.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At Sutton in North Dublin, Dermot extends a 1960s suburban house, changing a beloved childhood home into a sumptuous new one for Hannah, James and their twin sons. To give the couple the 'wow factor' they've asked for, Dermot designs a large L-shaped extension at the rear of the house with a soaring mezzanine level.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Having rented a house in Navan for the last two years, teacher Celine and sound engineer Dave are excited at the prospect of moving to a farmhouse once owned by her grandparents at Kildalkey village in County Meath where Celine grew up. The couple will be the fourth generation to live there and retaining the charm and character of the old place is a major concern for the whole family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the three years since newlyweds Rosie and Keith bought their five-bed house in Templeogue, Dublin 6, they haven't changed a thing. From the dark, cold interiors to the cavity block, flat roofed extension, this house is a relic of 1970s design, with décor to match. Keen to create a unique take on the rather unimaginative suburban semi, Dermot designs a radical, steep-roofed extension...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Country and Irish legend Daniel O'Donnell and his wife Majella share a large four bed detached home in Kincasslagh West Donegal. Unlike Daniel, who's fairly happy with the place, Majella is keen to upgrade and reconfigure the interior. With her husband on tour, she's determined to get the very best from her architect.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Nine years ago, Susie and Dave bought their dream home on the outskirts of Fermoy in Cork - a 170 year old three storey mansion that Susie has admired since she was a teenager. The house however, has begun to show its age and Susie and Dave want to extend and upgrade to create the ultimate family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: IT manager Christine has bought herself a red brick terraced house in Clontarf, North Dublin. Christine has big plans for the place but as Dermot quickly discovers, they're far bigger than her 130K budget will allow. And despite his best efforts, Dermot is unable to convince Christine to modify her 25 page wish list.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the seaside village of Portrane in North Dublin, Dermot creates a workable home for three generations of the one family under the watchful, budget-conscious eyes of two sisters.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Recently returned to Ireland after 12 years in London, new parents website designer Cliona and IT manager Micheal have already spent 30 grand renovating a 1950s semi-D at Killester in North Dublin in their own distinctive, industrial style.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dairy farmer Padraig and schoolteacher Katie are hoping to create their 'forever' home by renovating a century-old farmhouse on a half acre of land recently inherited from Padraig's uncle. But delivering this dream won't be easy for their architect. Dermot's problems begin when he presents his initial design and it Katie announces that she has no time for 'open plan' living.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At a 1960s 'Semi D' in Stillorgan, Dermot's vision of a million euro 'Malibu style' house for Rory and Lorna from the west of Ireland descends into an ongoing battle over the style and position of the front door.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: David and Nessa Conlon have just bought this 1990s split level detached bungalow and plan to move in with their three children (twin boys aged 11 and a 7 year old girl) once the renovations have been completed.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the second episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Borrisoleigh, Co. Tipperary, to meet Joe Kenny and his bride to be Mary Hayes. Joe's house is a 3 bedroom, 2 storey house on a half acre site about half a mile from Borrisoleigh, with beautiful views of green fields. Mary and Joe are creating their dream home, to move into just after their wedding. Joe has lived the bachelor life up until now and his house reflects this. Dermot can see exactly why Mary is insisting on a redesign.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the third episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Rathfarnham, where Yvonne and Adrian Saunders live with their daughter Lauren. Yvonne and Adrian's house is a detached 1950s two-bedroom property, in need of massive transformation. Dermot likens it to a 'Hansel and Gretel' house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In Ashford Co. Wicklow stands the house of Nigel and Frances Coffey. Frances's parents live next door. Several years ago her father built a private road and gave seven plots of land to his seven children.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Claudia and Tom bought this 1920s bungalow with panoramic views of Tramore Bay in 2012 for 305K. Just back from living abroad (Spain, Dubai and Germany) they have been living in the house for the past year.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Glenn Keating and Gustav van der Westhuizen live in Grace Park, Drumcondra, with their 5-year-old son Noah and two pet Weimaraner dogs. They live in an Edwardian terraced three story house. The terrace was originally built for officers of the British Army, between 1897 and 1902. Glenn is a youth worker for LGBTI+ young people in the city centre and Gustav is a banker.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot had a journey to go on with this build with Lisa and Marc.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Laura's expectations from Dermot were high but to get the build to the construction stage was tricky due to the tight budget.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Paul and Hilary really want to modernise the house that was built originally in the 1970s but they have to be clever with their budget.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot has a challenge, as he has to work within a tight budget of 210k and has a lot to do for what Jim and Mary want.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Conor and Amy are a young couple who have made the decision to put down roots together by renovating an old farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revealed a plan that would facilitate the old abode to be renovated plus he added a rear extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Carmel and Hugh wanted a home which was going to be manageable for them both going into their later years in life.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S13 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The Gray family have been living in the house for seventeen years, but they wanted to future proof it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Gráinne Murphy and Ivan Williams have been dreaming about renovating Ivan's forefather's old farmhouse for many years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Brian Carrigg and Kate Molony attempt to renovate a bungalow with a view of the Rock of Cashel that Kate has dreamed of owning all her life.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Sandra and Daniel Davey bought their dream home in Knocklyon, Dublin over four years ago.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S14 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Ann Brannigan and her husband David are attempting to give Ann's former family home in Santry, Dublin a complete renovation.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Eimear Farrell, a single mum and her 8-year-old daughter Hannah with a budget of 20,000 euros (our smallest budget in the series) need the entire downstairs of the 2 bedroomed home in Ballybrack completely re-modelled.

programme.title: Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Room To Improve - Dermot's Home
programme.desc: As it turns out, the only predictable thing about this build are delays caused by Dermot's obsessive attention to detail.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Glasnevin with Terry and Peadar Clarke and their two children Marie Bernadette and Luke.

programme.title: Room To Improve - Dermot's Home

Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bhutan Thimpu
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Backpack Belgrade, Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Scotland Perth (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Backpack Novi Sad, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 City Breaks Ahmedabad (ENG)
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Food Fact Fun The Hague, Netherlands
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeen (ENG)
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Backpack Pozarevac, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Food Fact Fun Rotterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeenshire (ENG)
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Backpack Majdanpek, Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Boarding Pass Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bhutan Paro
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 2(Eng)
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Food Fact Fun Utrecht, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 10 Days Scotland Inverness (ENG)
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Motorheads
programme.desc: Ferdinand Anton Ernst Porsche was a pioneer of the car business and created an icon among automobiles, the Porsche 356.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Motorheads
programme.desc: One of the most successful rally drivers of all time, Walter Roehrl.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Motorheads
programme.desc: Hans Joachim Stuck, a racing legend, ended his active career as a race driver in a Lamborghini Gallardo built by Reiter Engineering at the Nurburgring in 2011.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Track Masters
programme.desc: Following the progress of driver Uwe Nittle, as he gets ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Track Masters
programme.desc: A look at the RCN Challenge: The BMW Driving Experience and the Devils Diner.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Track Masters
programme.desc: Now that the 24-hour race is over we have left the Nuerburgring and moved to Bueren, Germany, where Raeder Sport is based. Famous for really fast front-wheel drives, it provides a lot of horsepower down on the track.

programme.title: Track Masters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Track Masters
programme.desc: The track at Nuerburgring is used for bike riding and running.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: American SUVs are large, have powerful engines and offer plenty of space.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: SUVs usually are rather impressive right out of the factory, but there are many tuning and customizing options; presenting Kelleners BMW X5, the Mercedes Brabus B63 and the Porsche Cayenne tuned by Techart.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Usually you wouldn't see small cars like the Audi A1, Volkswagen Golf, and Mini on an all-wheel magazine. But when the A becomes an S and the Golf gets an R, the small cars turn into strong all-wheel beasts. That's reason enough to test them.

programme.title: Tourist Trophy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Riders race through this legendary 37-mile course reaching speeds of over 200 miles per hour in a stunning display of skill and bravery in what has been deemed the most dangerous race in the world.

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Car History
programme.desc: An up-close look at how the Mercedes SL evolved from a racing car into a luxury sports vehicle.

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Car History

programme.title: Vendée Globe - LIVE Part 2
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe aims to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean conservation throughout the round-the-world race. They are direct witnesses to the changes underway, particularly around Antarctica, a region that is under particular threat.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 WOF 2025 #19: ABSA Cape Epic Series - Episode 1
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is known as one of the toughest mountain bike stage races in the world and pushes riders to their physical and mental limits. The first three stages set the tone for the entire race.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 WOF 2025 #20: ABSA Cape Epic Series - Episode 2
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is known as one of the toughest mountain bike stage races in the world and pushes riders to their physical and mental limits. The first three stages set the tone for the entire race.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 WOF 2025 #27: Epic Series - 4 Islands
programme.desc: The 4Islands Epic is a legendary stage race as part of the Epic Series, which takes place on the Croatian islands of the Kvarner region - Lošinj, Cres, Krk and occasionally Rab - and offers around 260 km and 5,600 vertical meters over five days (prologue + four stages).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 WOF 2025 #32: Epic Series - Andorra Epic
programme.desc: The Andorra Epic took place from July 15 to 18, 2025, in the breathtaking Pyrenees. Over four days, riders covered 160 km and 5,000 meters of elevation gain. The event offered world-class mountain biking in the unique atmosphere of Andorra's alpine villages.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026 - WOF 2026 _16_ Epic Series - ABSA Cape Epic Part 1
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: A Plea For Refuge
programme.desc: Two adventurous friends, Jeff Shapiro and Cody Tuttle, have a desire to experience one of the last, raw, and truly preserved wilderness areas on the North American continent, attempt to hike and fly paraglider's across the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge in Alaska.

programme.title: BACK TO NORMAL
programme.desc: For Ian Mitchard jumping out of airplanes and soaring above the earth with a nylon canopy is as normal as walking through the grocery store. But when a dramatic accident put the lifestyle he loves in jeopardy, Ian is forced to grapple with his body.

programme.title: Cerro Torre Fly & Climb
programme.desc: The West Face route with its long glacier approach through the Circo de los Altares certainly feels ‘out there’. That the whole team were able to take off from the summit with their paragliders is a testament to their skill, both as climbers and as pilots.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2025 #04: Maneuvre Vancouvre - with Hans Rey
programme.desc: In “Maneuver Vancouver”, mountain bike icons Hans Rey, Steve Peat and Wade Simmons embark on an exciting five-day journey through Vancouver. Join these three legends as they explore this iconic city.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Qatar Airways GKA Big Air World Championships 2022
programme.desc: In todays episode we´re going on another trip with our favorite Kite Sport Athletes. This time we are heading to Tarifa in Spain for the World first Big Air World Championships in several disciplines.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 Qatar Airways GKA Kitesurf World Tour

programme.title: Desert Dash Namibia 2024
programme.desc: The Desert Dash 2024 is an exhilarating mountain biking event that challenges riders to conquer the breathtaking terrain of the Namib Desert. Spanning over 24 hours, participants embark on a grueling 369-kilometer journey.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 WOF 2025 #34: Mystic Skate Cup - 30 Years Anniversary
programme.desc: The Mystic Sk8 Cup is one of the largest skateboarding competitions in Europe, attracting top skateboarders from around the world. For almost three decades, the biggest stars such as David Gonzalez, Dustin Dollin, Christian Hosoi and Tony Hawk have been competing

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E48 WOF 2025 #48: The Smell of Clouds

programme.title: Cape Epic 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Cape Epic 2026 - Stage 2
programme.desc: The 2026 Absa Cape Epic, pinnacle of the Epic Series, tears across 700 kilometres of raw South African wilderness, with 16 000 meters of climbing that will humble the unprepared and honour the relentless. Teams of two have to compete and cross the finish line together.

programme.title: Vendée Globe 2024 - 52min HL (Sailing, Mitte Februar) – International + DACH
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe wants to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean protection during the circumnavigation. By sailing around the world, the Vendée Globe sailors are drawing attention to the fragility of our oceans.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 WOF 2024 #47: Engadin Skimarathon

programme.title: Red Bull Romaniacs 2025 - 150min Live Summary
